overview.title: Senior AI Engineer
overview.subtitle: LLM Systems Architect, RAG & Transformer Optimization

about.p1: Senior AI Engineer specializing in Large Language Models (LLMs), LangChain, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Experienced in designing and deploying AI solutions from research prototypes to production-scale systems, with measurable impact on system performance, accuracy, and efficiency.
about.p2: Expert in Python, C/C++, Node.js, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and cloud AI infrastructure. Passionate about building scalable, robust AI applications and mentoring international teams.

contact.title: Contact.
contact.body: Tell me about your project, goals, or how I can help. I will respond within 1-2 business days.

form.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to say?
form.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent.
form.error: Please fill out all fields and try again.

items.company: Primer AI, Inc | San Francisco, CA, USA
items.scope: Lead architect for production-grade LLM and Retrieval-Augmented Generation(RAG) systems
bullets: Designed and deployed enterprise RAG platform indexing 1.5M+ documents
Improved: Precision5: 84% ~ 93%,  MRR: 0.71 ~ 0.83, Hallucination rate reduced by 27%
Reduced LLM inference latency 2.1s ~ 0.8s via: Quantization (INT8/4-bit), Smart batching, Retrieval pruning
Fine-tuned 7B–13B parameter transformer models using PyTorch + Hugging Face
Built internal evaluation framework covering: Precision / Recall / F1, ROUGE-L, BLEU, Retrieval hit-rate
Mentored 5 ML engineers and established model review & evaluation standards

items.company: Wispr Flow | San Francisco, CA, USA
items.scope: Built NLP and transformer-based AI systems from prototype to scalable production.
bullets: Developed semantic search engine using vector embeddings: Reduced search error rate by 31%(percent), Achieved <900ms response latency
Built abstractive summarization system (BART/T5-based): ROUGE-L: 0.79, Reduced manual review time by 42%
Implemented transformer-based classification systems (BERT/RoBERTa): F1-score improved 0.76 ~ 0.88
Built inference APIs handling 80K+ daily requests
Productionized models using Docker + Kubernetes + AWS

items.company: Vietnam AI Research Lab | Ho Chi Minh city, Vietnam
items.scope: Focused on deep learning research and early transformer applications.
bullets: Researched transformer-based architectures for NLP tasks
Developed QA and text classification prototypes
Implemented SepFormer-based audio separation system: SDR improvement: +6.5 dB, SNR improvement: +7 dB
Conducted systematic evaluation using: SDR / SNR (audio), Precision / Recall / F1 (NLP)

zetabarber-platform.title: Enterprise RAG Platform
zetabarber-platform.description: Designed and deployed a scalable Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system integrating LLMs with hybrid vector search (dense + BM25) to support enterprise knowledge retrieval.

warmly-ai-gtm.title: Transformer-based Summarization System
warmly-ai-gtm.description: Developed an abstractive document summarization platform using fine-tuned BART/T5 transformer models for enterprise document workflows.

gmelius-email-collaboration.title: Audio Separation with SepFormer
gmelius-email-collaboration.description: Built an embedding-based semantic search system improving contextual relevance beyond keyword search.
